global: consistent art style across all assets
no text, no letters, no numbers, no icons unless specified
transparent background alpha, no checkerboard pattern
keep soft outer drop shadow visible on transparent background

recommended_scaling: Use Stack to place frame/panels behind interactive Flutter widgets.
For panels/buttons, use 9-slice (nine-patch) or split into 3 parts (left cap / stretch middle / right cap) to avoid stretching corners and triangular caps.
For pins, easiest is 2-3 PNG states: normal/selected/done. You can also add glow via Flutter but keeping a selected PNG makes it look more consistent.
button_stretch_tip: If you want the gold button to stretch without deforming the triangular caps, either:
1) Use nine-slice scaling so only the middle region stretches, or
2) Export 3 images: btn_left_cap.png, btn_mid.png, btn_right_cap.png and assemble with Row + Expanded(mid).
scroll_popup_usage: Use the scroll_popup.png as the background of a modal/bottomsheet.
Overlay title text and content using Flutter widgets aligned within the safe inner content area.
